ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn Of Deft Pillsbury Winthrop Llp For Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulated Settlement [Ccp 664.6]
Off Calendar Oct-31-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert H. Bunzel, Esq. of BARTKO, ZANKEL 956-1900 for deft/x-claimant PILLSBURY MADISON & SUTRO LLP moving party
Eric C. Shaw, Esq. of HONOWITZ & SHAW 421-6110 specially appearing for the Plaintiffs
Jerome Fishkin, Esq. 403-1300 for ANDERLINI, FINKELSTEIN & EMRICK
Counsel represented in open court that the parties have reached a resolution. The settlement was read into the record the basic terms of which are contained in Exhibit A; general release; execution of a dismissal with prejudice on the Complaint and Cross-Complaint; Acknowledgment of liens.
All counsel present as well as Mr. Eric Martinez, CEO of MARKETEL INTERNATIONAL, INC. agreed to the terms of the settlement as outlined in open court. Motion granted. Joe Vickstein CSR 4780.

Counsel represented in open court that the parties have reached a resolution. The settlement was read into the record the basic terms of which are contained in Exhibit A; general release; execution of a dismissal with prejudice on the Complaint and Cross-Complaint; Acknowledgment of liens.
All counsel present as well as Mr. Eric Martinez, CEO of MARKETEL INTERNATIONAL, INC. agreed to the terms of the settlement as outlined in open court. Motion granted. Joe Vickstein CSR 4780.

Mtn To W/D Atty
Off Calendar Oct-24-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Jerome Fishkin, Esq. 403-1300 specially appearing for the law firm of ANDERLINI, FINKELSTEIN & EMERICK moving to withdraw as attorney of record for Plaintiff MARKETEL INTERNATIONAL, INC. Byron-Eric Martinez, Board of Directors of MARKETEL INTERNATIONAL INC. 353-5753 present in court. Robert H. Bunzel, Esq. of the Law Offices of BARTKO, ZANKEL 956-1900 for defendant PILLSBURY. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff shall have 30 days to appear by counsel or Defendants may come in ex-parte to have this case dismissed. Court reporter JOE VICKSTEIN CSR 4780
